cross_scene_arcs.title: From Isolation to Reluctant Protector
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Eric emerges from drunken isolation, reactivates through violence and transactional choices, and is drawn into a larger conflict through emotional manipulation, shifting from passive survivor to active participant.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: hungover and disoriented, living in isolation
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: emotionally destabilized but officially recruited by Queen Ravenna

cross_scene_arcs.title: Moral Descent and Redemption Through Alliance
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Eric transitions from selling captives and serving the Queen for personal gain to protecting Snow White, ultimately sacrificing for a cause greater than himself, culminating in quiet departure after her victory.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: sells Rose without guilt, motivated by money
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: chooses to leave Snow White's coronation, having fulfilled a protective role
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The nature of Eric and Snow White's relationship remains unspoken and unconsummated

cross_scene_arcs.title: Confronting Grief and Seeking Vengeance
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Eric's unresolved trauma over Sara's death is repeatedly triggered, manipulated by Ravenna, manifested in hallucinations, and finally resolved through vengeance when he learns Finn killed her.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: haunted by Sara's spectral presence, emotionally numb
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: impaled but victorious in killing Finn, having avenged Sara

cross_scene_arcs.title: Evolution of Relationship with Snow White
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Eric's relationship with Snow White evolves from captor to protector, mentor, and emotionally connected ally, marked by shared vulnerability, symbolic gestures, and silent mutual respect.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: captures Snow White under Queen's orders
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: shares a meaningful glance at her coronation before departing
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The nature of Eric and Snow White's relationship remains unspoken and unconsummated

cross_scene_arcs.title: Reclamation of Leadership and Competence
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Eric reasserts his authority as a skilled tracker and leader in hostile environments, regains physical and emotional control, and earns the respect of allies and adversaries alike.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: established as group leader during tracking mission
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: humbled but respected after being saved and returning the respect

cross_scene_arcs.title: Rise to Power Through Deception and Murder
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ravenna transitions from captive to queen by manipulating King Magnus and Snow White, culminating in the murder of the king to seize the throne.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Ravenna is a prisoner freed by King Magnus, who is captivated by her beauty.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Ravenna has killed King Magnus and assumed control of the throne.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The origin of the shadow army and her full powers remain unclear.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Consolidation of Rule Through Violence and Control
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ravenna secures her rule by eliminating threats through mass executions, strategic warfare, and supernatural enforcers, maintaining dominance over her enemies and allies alike.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Ravenna orders the execution of wedding guests and imprisons Snow White to eliminate opposition.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: She commands a battlefield and deploys Dark Faeries to isolate and destroy Snow White's allies.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Snow White continues to advance despite overwhelming force.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Dependence on and Decline of Magical Power
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ravenna's physical deterioration reveals her growing dependence on magic to sustain her youth, leading to desperation as her powers wane and her body fails.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: She shows visible aging and restores herself by absorbing Rose's youth.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: She is physically weakened, mocked by the Mirror Man, and cut off from supernatural support.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Her magic is fading and requires increasingly costly sacrifices to maintain.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Obsession with Snow White as Key to Immortality
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ravenna shifts focus to capturing Snow White after learning her heart grants immortality, driving her final actions to secure eternal life.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: She learns that Snow White's heart can end her need to consume youth.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: She orchestrates a battle and poisons Snow White to capture her alive for heart extraction.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Snow White is at large and must be captured before it's too late.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Final Reconciliation and Death
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ravenna's initially performative bond with Snow White evolves into a moment of genuine connection as she dies, acknowledging their shared blood and releasing her hostility.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Ravenna feigns maternal affection to manipulate Snow White.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: She dies peacefully, showing real maternal warmth and recognition of their bond.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Heir to Queen: Snow White's Rise to Leadership
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Snow White transitions from newborn royal heir to crowned queen, marked by loss, exile, and eventual reclaiming of her rightful place through personal courage and public recognition.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: officially crowned queen ruling a peaceful realm

cross_scene_arcs.title: Loss and Resilience: Coping with Family Betrayal and Death
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Snow White endures the deaths of both parents and betrayal by trusted figures, shifting from familial security to isolation and targeted survival.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: beloved daughter within a stable royal family
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: betrayed and poisoned by a trusted figure disguised as a friend
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: emotional toll of repeated betrayal and loss remains unaddressed

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Flight to Fight: Development of Agency and Combat Readiness
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Snow White evolves from a fugitive reacting to threats into an active combatant, learning defense, escaping confinement, and ultimately defeating her enemy in battle.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: victorious in combat, having slain her enemy with skill

cross_scene_arcs.title: Recognition as a Symbol of Healing and Restoration
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Snow White's innate empathy and connection to nature culminate in her being recognized as a life-bringer, fulfilling a symbolic role in healing the land and uniting the people.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: child showing compassion to an injured bird
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: acknowledged as a unifying figure who inspires rebellion and restoration
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: her full spiritual power and purpose remain partially unexplored

cross_scene_arcs.title: Complex Bonds: Relationships with Key Male Figures
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Snow White's relationships with William, Eric, and the Duke evolve from childhood friendship and mentorship to layered emotional connections involving trust, betrayal, and unspoken affection.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: emotionally connected to both William and Eric, with romantic future unresolved
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: her romantic feelings and future remain ambiguous despite clear emotional bonds
